det_check_template:
proof fn det_new_container_with_endpoint(pre_self_: ProcessManager, thread_ptr: ThreadPtr, endpoint_index: EndpointIdx, pt_regs: Registers, new_pcid: Pcid, new_quota: Quota, page_ptr_1: PagePtr, page_perm_1: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, page_ptr_2: PagePtr, page_perm_2: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, page_ptr_3: PagePtr, page_perm_3: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, post1_self_: ProcessManager, r1: (), post2_self_: ProcessManager, r2: ())
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.thread_dom().contains(thread_ptr)), (pre_self_.page_closure().contains(page_ptr_1) == false), (pre_self_.page_closure().contains(page_ptr_2) == false), (pre_self_.page_closure().contains(page_ptr_3) == false), (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).depth != usize::MAX), (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.mem_4k - 3 >= new_quota.mem_4k), (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.spec_greater(new_quota)), (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).children.len() < CONTAINER_CHILD_LIST_LEN), (0 <= endpoint_index < MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS), (pre_self_.get_endpoint_by_endpoint_idx(thread_ptr, endpoint_index).is_Some() || pre_self_.get_endpoint_ptr_by_endpoint_idx(thread_ptr, endpoint_index).is_Some()), (pre_self_.get_endpoint_by_endpoint_idx(thread_ptr,endpoint_index).unwrap().rf_counter_is_full() == false 
            || pre_self_.get_endpoint(pre_self_.get_endpoint_ptr_by_endpoint_idx(thread_ptr, endpoint_index).unwrap(),).rf_counter_is_full() == false), (forall|p_ptr_i: ProcPtr|
                #![trigger pre_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr_i) ]
                pre_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr_i) ==> pre_self_.get_proc(p_ptr_i).pcid != new_pcid), (page_perm_1@.is_init()), (page_perm_1@.addr() == page_ptr_1), (page_perm_2@.is_init()), (page_perm_2@.addr() == page_ptr_2), (page_perm_3@.is_init()), (page_perm_3@.addr() == page_ptr_3), (page_ptr_1 != page_ptr_2), (page_ptr_1 != page_ptr_3), (page_ptr_2 != page_ptr_3),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().insert(page_ptr_1).insert(
                page_ptr_2,
            ).insert(page_ptr_3))
            &&& (post1_self_.proc_dom() =~= pre_self_.proc_dom().insert(page_ptr_2))
            &&& (post1_self_.endpoint_dom() == pre_self_.endpoint_dom())
            &&& (post1_self_.container_dom() == pre_self_.container_dom().insert(page_ptr_1))
            &&& (post1_self_.thread_dom() == pre_self_.thread_dom().insert(page_ptr_3))
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.mem_4k
                - 3 - new_quota.mem_4k == post1_self_.get_container(
                post1_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.mem_4k)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.mem_2m
                - new_quota.mem_2m == post1_self_.get_container(
                post1_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.mem_2m)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.mem_1g
                - new_quota.mem_1g == post1_self_.get_container(
                post1_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.mem_1g)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.pcid
                - new_quota.pcid == post1_self_.get_container(
                post1_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.pcid)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.ioid
                - new_quota.ioid == post1_self_.get_container(
                post1_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.ioid)
            &&& (forall|p_ptr: ProcPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr)]
                pre_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr) ==> post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr) =~= pre_self_.get_proc(p_ptr))
            &&& (forall|c_ptr: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr)]
                pre_self_.container_dom().contains(c_ptr) && c_ptr != pre_self_.get_thread(
                    thread_ptr,
                ).owning_container ==> post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).owned_procs =~= pre_self_.get_container(c_ptr).owned_procs && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).parent =~= pre_self_.get_container(c_ptr).parent && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).parent_rev_ptr =~= pre_self_.get_container(c_ptr).parent_rev_ptr && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).children =~= pre_self_.get_container(c_ptr).children && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).owned_endpoints
                    =~= pre_self_.get_container(c_ptr).owned_endpoints && post1_self_.get_container(
                    c_ptr,
                ).quota =~= pre_self_.get_container(c_ptr).quota
                // &&
                // self.get_container(c_ptr).mem_used =~= pre_self_.get_container(c_ptr).mem_used
                 && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).owned_cpus =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                    c_ptr,
                ).owned_cpus && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).scheduler =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                    c_ptr,
                ).scheduler && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).owned_threads =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                    c_ptr,
                ).owned_threads && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).depth =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                    c_ptr,
                ).depth && post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).uppertree_seq =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                    c_ptr,
                ).uppertree_seq)
            &&& (forall|c_ptr: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr)]
                post1_self_.container_dom().contains(c_ptr) && post1_self_.get_container(
                    page_ptr_1,
                ).uppertree_seq@.contains(c_ptr) ==> post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).subtree_set@
                    =~= post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).subtree_set@.insert(page_ptr_1))
            &&& (forall|c_ptr: ContainerPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr)]
                post1_self_.container_dom().contains(c_ptr) && post1_self_.get_container(
                    page_ptr_1,
                ).uppertree_seq@.contains(c_ptr) == false ==> post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).subtree_set
                    =~= post1_self_.get_container(c_ptr).subtree_set)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).owned_procs
                =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).owned_procs)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).parent =~= pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).parent)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).children@ =~= pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).children@.push(
                page_ptr_1,
            ))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).owned_endpoints
                =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).owned_endpoints)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.mem_4k
                - 3 - new_quota.mem_4k == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.mem_4k)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.mem_2m
                - new_quota.mem_2m == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.mem_2m)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.mem_1g
                - new_quota.mem_1g == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.mem_1g)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.pcid
                - new_quota.pcid == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.pcid)
            &&& (pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).quota.ioid
                - new_quota.ioid == post1_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).quota.ioid)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).owned_cpus
                =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).owned_cpus)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).scheduler =~= pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).scheduler)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).owned_threads
                =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).owned_threads)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).depth =~= pre_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).depth)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).uppertree_seq
                =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).uppertree_seq)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).subtree_set@
                =~= pre_self_.get_container(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ).subtree_set@.insert(page_ptr_1))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).owned_procs@ =~= Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty().push(
                page_ptr_2,
            ))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).parent =~= Some(
                pre_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container,
            ))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).children@ =~= Seq::<ContainerPtr>::empty())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).owned_endpoints@ =~= Set::<EndpointPtr>::empty())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).quota =~= new_quota)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).owned_cpus.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).owned_cpus@ =~= Set::<CpuId>::empty())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).scheduler.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).scheduler@ =~= Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty().push(
                page_ptr_3,

            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).owned_threads@.finite())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).owned_threads@ =~= Set::<ThreadPtr>::empty().insert(
                page_ptr_3,

            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).depth as int =~= post1_self_.get_container(

            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).uppertree_seq@ =~= post1_self_.get_container(

            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).subtree_set@ =~= Set::<ContainerPtr>::empty())

                pre_self_.thread_dom().contains(t_ptr) ==> pre_self_.get_thread(t_ptr)

                post1_self_.endpoint_dom().contains(e_ptr) && e_ptr != pre_self_.get_endpoint_ptr_by_endpoint_idx(thread_ptr, endpoint_index).unwrap() ==> pre_self_.get_endpoint(e_ptr) =~= post1_self_.get_endpoint(e_ptr))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).children@ == Seq::<ContainerPtr>::empty())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).owned_procs@ == Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty().push(page_ptr_2))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).owned_threads@ == Set::<ThreadPtr>::empty().insert(
                page_ptr_3,
            ))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(page_ptr_1).quota == new_quota)

            &&& (post1_self_.get_proc(page_ptr_2).ioid.is_None())
            &&& (post1_self_.get_proc(page_ptr_2).owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty().push(page_ptr_3))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_proc(page_ptr_2).owning_container == page_ptr_1)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_thread(page_ptr_3).owning_container == page_ptr_1)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_thread(page_ptr_3).endpoint_descriptors@ =~= Seq::new(
                MAX_NUM_ENDPOINT_DESCRIPTORS as nat,

            ).update(
                0,
                Some(
                    pre_self_.get_endpoint_ptr_by_endpoint_idx(thread_ptr, endpoint_index).unwrap(),

                page_ptr_1,

            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(post1_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).owned_procs@ =~= pre_self_.get_container(post1_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).owned_procs@)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container(post1_self_.get_thread(thread_ptr).owning_container).owned_endpoints@
                =~= pre_self_.get_container(

            &&& (post1_self_.get_endpoint(

            ).owning_threads@.insert((page_ptr_3, 0)))
